payload.claim_text: Overtime was $66.0 million (102.0%) unfavorable YTD mainly due to higher than projected absentee coverage needs and severe weather condition
payload.subject: NYCT Overtime

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenue was $25.7 million (4.6%) unfavorable YTD primarily due to lower Bus and Subways ridership partially offset by higher average fare
payload.subject: NYCT Farebox Revenue

payload.claim_text: Payroll was $27.1 million (4.2%) favorable YTD primarily due to vacancies
payload.subject: NYCT Payroll

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $4.8 million (15.2%) unfavorable to the Budget due to lower paid ridership and lower average fare
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company Farebox Revenue

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $0.127 million (17.6%) unfavorable to the Budget due to lower-than-projected paid ridership
payload.subject: Staten Island Railway Farebox Revenue

payload.claim_text: Farebox revenue was lower by $25.7 million (4.6%) with Subway farebox revenue lower by $7.6 million (1.7%) and Bus farebox revenue lower by $17.8 million (15.7%)
payload.subject: NYCT Farebox Revenue

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.description: Financial results are from preliminary close and may be adjusted in subsequent months
